title: Why is Shinji the only male pilot
display_title: Why is Shinji the only male pilot
wikitext:
[]: Why is Shinji the only male pilot? Post by El Squibbonator » Fri Aug 15, 2014 8:34 pm Like the title says, I've noticed that the majority of Eva pilots seem to be female. the only exceptions I can think of are Shinji and Toji (though Toji only lasted one episode, and never pilots at all in Rebuild). Why do you suppose this role reversal compared to normal mecha anime is there?

[]: Post by Guy Nacks » Fri Aug 15, 2014 8:54 pm Shinji Toji Kaworu (didn't pilot, but technically the Fifth Child) Rei Asuka Yui (Just a test pilot) I count three each for NGE. The female pilots get way more screentime actually being pilots, I agree, but I ain't complaining. Plus the role reversal is more interesting to watch,

[]: Post by El Squibbonator » Fri Aug 15, 2014 8:58 pm I don't count Yui or Kaworu as pilots, since neither technically fill all of the qualifications (Yui wasn't born after second impact, Kaworu wasn't human to begin with)

[]: Post by Sgt. Griff » Fri Aug 15, 2014 9:55 pm Guy Nacks wrote: The female pilots get way more screentime actually being pilots, I agree, but I ain't complaining. Plus the role reversal is more interesting to watch,

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Aug 15, 2014 9:58 pm If you want to get rid of Kaworu, you'd have to get rid of Rei, because both of them are the exact same thing. That leaves Kaworu, Shinji, and Toji as the male Eva pilots, and Asuka and Rei as the female. The male pilots outnumber the female pilots 3 to 2. As for "reason", there's no reason why there should be. These are very small sample sizes, and the pilots could just as easily have been all-male or all-female. Frankly, their gender doesn't matter, because their personalities are pretty independent of it.

[]: Post by El Squibbonator » Fri Aug 15, 2014 10:21 pm Oh. I guess I was just thinking about the main three.

[]: Post by UrsusArctos » Fri Aug 15, 2014 10:28 pm Pfft. Anyway, since there's nothing more to discuss, I'll close this.
